_description: Summer Cut data blob v1.1. Single source of truth for dashboard + roundtable. daily_log holds last 14 days with full detail. daily_log_archive holds older days as trend-line summaries.

MF quick-add of 1310/70P/125C/55F matched AI estimate exactly -- no adjustment needed.

nutrition.reconciliation_notes: From MacroFactor Excel export. Day may not be complete yet.

sets.notes: got bumped off cable, 1 working set only

sessions.subjective_notes: Left knee felt iffy on squats, had some doubt but completed all reps. Considered 230 but held back. DB chest press rep PR: 70x7 up from 70x6.

sets.notes: Long warmup series to 80 lbs, 1 working set. Got bumped off machine.

sessions.subjective_notes: Light day due to time constraints. Not well-rested. Meticulous warmups.

sets.notes: Big pink machine. 3 plates + 25 per side (160/side)
Meticulous warmup to 80 lbs, 2 working sets

sessions.subjective_notes: Circuit-style finish after RDLs. Meticulous warmups on all exercises.

sets.notes: Different/newer York DBs that felt heavier

sessions.subjective_notes: Fan bike warmup. Short session — had to leave for 3.5hr tattoo appointment. Only 2 sets of rows and machine press. Newer York DBs at 70 lbs felt heavier than the usual ones.

sets.notes: 4 plates + 35 per side (215/side). Up from 420 on 05-12.
3 plates per side. Superset with triceps pulldowns
PR -- up from 135 lbs. Superset with rows
Different machine, near max stack. Superset with rows

sessions.subjective_notes: Felt good -- fueled by higher-calorie day prior. Glute drive +10 lbs, triceps PR at 145. Superset rows with triceps for 5 sets each. Extra triceps volume because triceps are the limiter on pressing movements.
Trap bar top set at 336 (new weight PR). KB swings were taxing. Session after charcuterie dinner out.

sets.notes: Back-off. Grinder -- fought for every rep.
Got bumped off machine after 1 set
Red machine. 2 plates per side. Felt weak -- diminished from sleep + incline press.
Dropped to 1 plate per side, pump sets.

sessions.subjective_notes: Short sleep (5h32m) + work/study stress. Tempted to skip but went anyway. Incline press top set at 230 (+5 from last incline session at 225). Flat press suffered -- failed 5th rep at 225 on set 2, pivoted to high-rep pump work. Curls solid at 80x8x3. Kept session short.

Easiest squat session of the cut by far. Strongest since March depressive period. No left knee issues (cf. May 11 knee discomfort). RPE 8 across all 3 sets -- clean and confident. Superset lat pulldowns with triceps pushdowns. Rest day tomorrow.

sets.notes: CUT PR. 100 lbs per side (2 plates + 10). Up from 230 top set on 05-18.

exercises.name: Cybex Arm Curl Machine
exercises.notes: Warmup only -- got jacked off machine before working sets.

sets.notes: Superset with triceps pushdowns. Held back intentionally.
Plate 14 on stack. Superset with curls.

sessions.subjective_notes: Cut PR on incline press: 245x6 (up from 230). Shockingly strong despite mediocre sleep lately. Got bumped off Cybex curl machine (again). Row held at 145/side. Lat pulldowns holding the line at 160 with underhand grip. Quick superset finisher -- curls + triceps, got the pump and bounced. Progressing on a cut. ~2600+ cal day.

sets.notes: PR -- 5 plates per side (225/side). Machine maxed out. Up from 430 on 05-17.
3 plates + 15 per side. Superset with triceps pushdowns. Last rep sucked.
Failed rep 6. Dropped to 70, got 2 more reps.

sessions.subjective_notes: Sleep deprivation catching up. Not strongest day but still put in the work. Hip thrust PR at 450 (machine maxed out) -- always been strong here, will progress via reps going forward. DB bench took a hit -- 70x6 was RPE 10, dropped to 65 for remaining sets. Rows up to 150/side (from 145 on 05-22). Lat pulldowns and triceps pushdowns both showing fatigue. BJJ returns tonight.

history.notes: Left knee felt iffy but completed all reps
Easiest of the cut. No knee issues. Strongest since March.
Top set 336x3, back-off 326x5x2. Weight PR on trap bar.

micronutrient_status._basis: 8-day average (May 3-10). Updated after reconciling Mother's Day dinner with per-item micro estimates.
micronutrient_status.borderline: B12 83% - Magnesium 84% - Panto (B5) 86% -- borderline OK. B12 improved from 76% after May 10 beef intake.
micronutrient_status.top_fix_note: 8 micronutrients below 80% RDA (down from 9 -- B12 graduated to borderline after Mother's Day beef). Top 3 fixes: eggs (choline, B12, A), spinach (folate, A, K), canned salmon (calcium, B12, omega-3). No dairy -- athlete is lactose intolerant.

action_items.title: Close the choline gap (45% RDA)
action_items.detail: Add 2-3 whole eggs daily (+294mg choline, +180 cal). Also boosts B12 and vitamin A. Biggest single-food improvement available.

action_items.title: Boost calcium + riboflavin (dairy-free)
action_items.detail: Canned salmon with bones 3-4x/week (283mg calcium per 3oz + B12, D, omega-3) plus daily fortified plant milk (300mg calcium/cup). Closes calcium gap without dairy.

action_items.title: Add spinach to dinner rotation
action_items.detail: 100g frozen spinach covers folate, vitamin A, and boosts magnesium at only 29 cal. Already eating frozen veg nightly -- easy swap/add.

action_items.title: Consider a B-complex supplement
action_items.detail: Thiamin, riboflavin, B12 all below 80% from food alone. A single B-complex closes all three gaps at zero caloric cost.

action_items.title: Eat more canned salmon
action_items.detail: 283mg calcium (from bones), 4.1mcg B12, 14mcg vitamin D, plus omega-3. Closes multiple gaps simultaneously.

action_items.title: Food DB gaps filled
action_items.detail: 6 missing foods added, 27 sparse entries upgraded, bioavailability + amino acid + GI fields added. DB v2.0 deployed.

action_items.title: May 8 reconciled
action_items.detail: AI-logged Indian dinner: fish fry 349cal, paneer curry 927cal, 4 naan 580cal. Actual: 4,332 cal / 220g P.

action_items.title: May 10 reconciled
action_items.detail: Mother's Day dinner AI-logged from gram weights: egg rolls 159g, noodles 196g, veg 177g, beef 148g, lobster ball 40g. MF quick-add matched at 1310 cal / 70P / 125C / 55F.

daily_log_archive._description: Compressed daily entries older than 14 days.

_archival_logic.description: Run by the Cowork morning task after writing today's entry. Moves entries older than 14 days from daily_log to daily_log_archive in compressed format.
_archival_logic.when_to_run: Daily, as part of the 10am morning prep task, after writing the new day's entry
_archival_logic.note: Never archive today or the last 13 days. The roundtable needs full per-meal detail for at least 2 weeks of recent history.

weekly_targets._description: Set by the Performance Roundtable each Sunday. The dashboard heatmap and adherence metrics read from here.

current.notes: Post-DEXA targets. Protein anchored to ~1g/lb lean mass (~140 lbs LBM). Calories dropped to 2000 -- athlete has plenty to lose. Carb/fat targets unchanged pending roundtable review.

history.notes: Initial targets from observed intake patterns.

weekly_programming._description: Set by the Performance Roundtable (Helms voice). Training prescription for the coming week.

current.notes: Need 2-3 weeks of training log data before Helms can prescribe a structured program.

supplement_stack._description: Daily supplements not captured in MacroFactor food logs. Dashboard should add these to food-only micronutrient totals before flagging deficiencies.

micronutrient_status._description: Supplement-adjusted micronutrient assessment. Based on MF Excel export May 3-23 + supplement stack. Dashboard reads this to avoid false deficiency flags.
micronutrient_status.assessment_basis: 21-day avg from MacroFactor export + daily supplement contributions

fiber.notes: High due to keto bread, PB powder, protein bars (functional fiber). Avg 84g.

calcium.notes: Fortified almond milk is primary driver.

zinc.fix: Red meat 2-3x/wk or standalone zinc supplement

folate.fix: Extra leafy greens or fortified foods

sodium.notes: Avg 3436mg vs 2300mg UL. Driven by processed snacks and soy sauce.
